title: sweetia longifolia
intro: Sweetia longifolia, also known as Khas or Khas-khas, is a plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Sweetia longifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Sweetia longifolia include tea, powder, and oil, which can be used to make infusions, poultices, and topical creams for various health benefits.
